value.option_a: Merge by email, using input order (later record wins) with field-level overrides
value.option_b: Merge by email, using createdAt timestamp for newer record
value.option_c: Merge by email, using a custom merge function with priority
value.ranking: Option A > Option C > Option B (Option B is invalid per task brief)
value.rejected_strategies: Option B (uses createdAt instead of input order), Option C (unnecessary complexity)
value.assumptions_to_test: Input order determines 'newer', empty strings don't override
value.smallest_safe_diff: Process records sequentially, track first occurrence via email, merge fields with later non-empty values
